description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a compact, angular frame and a matte black slide. The grip is robust and slightly contoured, designed for ergonomic handling, and appears to be made of a polymer or composite material. The trigger guard is squared and thick, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The slide features minimalistic detailing, with a small rectangular marking on the top, and the barrel is short, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and integrated seamlessly with the grip, without any visible extensions or finger rests. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian self-defense scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a contoured grip, squared trigger guard, and minimal slide markings. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, highlighting the contoured grip, squared trigger guard, and the flat, angular slide.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle, front sight, and the squared-off trigger guard, emphasizing the width and symmetry of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the grip contour and slide profile from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip, with the magazine base visible at the bottom.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and slightly contoured, with a smooth surface and no visible texturing or checkering. It appears to be made of a matte polymer material, designed for ergonomic comfort, and lacks finger grooves, logos, or embellishments. The backstrap and frontstrap are straight, contributing to a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared and thick, providing a spacious opening for finger placement. It has a flat front edge with no undercuts or integrated accessories, and the surface is smooth without any reinforcement or texturing.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the slide, featuring a standard profile without threading, porting, or compensators. There are no visible markings or special finishes on the exterior of the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide has a single small rectangular marking on the top, likely representing a manufacturer plate or model indicator. There are no visible engravings, serial numbers, or decorative patterns elsewhere on the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing. Its design is minimalistic and functional.
